realismNote: On this live Polymarket top-volume slice, most books remain too tight to survive even conservative one-venue friction.
Under a 2.5% friction assumption, quoted widths below 2.5% are not promotable as net-positive spread-capture candidates.
The actionable watchlist is therefore only the wider political books, and even those still need depth and queue-position checks before any paper-trade promotion.
